title: Endermen Secretly Use a Diamond Axe

scenes.clipper_notes: Show an enderman standing in a studio world, camera not moving

Show the enderman from one but this time its night time and there's glowstone from above that can't be seen thats illuminating just where the enderman is standing like its a spotlight on them in a dark world

Show an empty first person inventory which has nothing besides for a diamond axe enchanted with silk touch 1 in the center. Clip starts with inventory being opened and then mouse hovers over the axe showing the name and enchant
Flashback of an enderman standing still focused on their hand like the enderman secretly has it but it just can't be seen.
my character looking at the camera infront of the scene from #4
